overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat exploring a foggy, dark Victorian-era city at night. The character walks through narrow cobblestone alleys with gas lamps, crosses a wooden platform over a muddy encampment, and enters a large industrial warehouse, with atmospheric lighting creating a horror-themed ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow Victorian alley with wooden market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alley, passing wooden stalls and brick buildings illuminated by warm gas lamps

entered.detail: covered wooden stall with sloped roof and hanging sign
multi-story brick building with lit windows and architectural details
cast iron lamp post emitting warm orange light
tall wooden planking blocking off the right side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow foggy alley lined with brick townhouses and wooden market stalls. Warm gas lamps cast orange light against the blue fog, creating a moody Victorian atmosphere. The ground is cobblestone and the space feels enclosed by buildings on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy narrow passage between high brick walls

events.description: enters narrow foggy alley between high brick walls with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a tight fog-filled corridor toward a distant metal gate

entered.detail: tight corridor with rough brick walls on both sides creating a canyon-like effect
large iron gate structure marking the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a very narrow brick passage with heavy fog limiting visibility. The character walks toward a metal archway gate at the end of the corridor, with brick walls pressing in on both sides. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden platform crossing over muddy construction area

events.description: passes through iron gate onto elevated wooden walkway
jumps down from wooden platform to muddy ground below

agents.ego_description: walking across an elevated wooden platform then jumping down to the muddy ground

entered.detail: tall iron gate with vertical bars now open and passing through
elevated wooden plank walkway with railings on sides
wooden scaffolding structure against the building
intensely bright street lamp creating lens flare and harsh shadows

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a metal gate onto an elevated wooden walkway. Construction scaffolding is visible on the left while a bright lamp post illuminates the fog on the right. The character walks to the end of the platform and jumps down to the muddy ground below, transitioning from the enclosed alley to a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy encampment with canvas tents and debris

agents.ego_description: walking through a muddy camp area with tents, heading toward a large warehouse building

entered.detail: open area with muddy ground, scattered debris, and makeshift camp elements
large canvas tent with peaked roof
large industrial brick warehouse with multiple windows and large entry doors
wooden barrel with metal bands sitting in the mud

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a muddy encampment with canvas tents and scattered wooden barrels. The ground is wet dirt and debris. In the distance, a large brick warehouse building looms with lights visible in the windows. Bare trees and fog create a desolate atmosphere as the character approaches the warehouse entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large industrial warehouse interior with high ceilings

events.description: enters large warehouse through open double doors

agents.ego_description: walking through large open doors into a vast warehouse interior illuminated by scattered fires and candles

entered.detail: vast open interior space with high ceilings and industrial architecture
large white-painted wooden doors swung open
large covered machinery and equipment in the warehouse
metal barrels with fires burning inside providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a massive warehouse interior through large open doors. The space is dimly lit by burning barrels and scattered candles, with industrial machinery visible in the shadows. The transition from the foggy outdoor camp to the enclosed warehouse creates a dramatic change in atmosphere and lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridors with brick walls and metal staircases

events.description: ascends metal staircase to upper level of warehouse

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow brick corridors and ascending a metal staircase deeper into the warehouse

entered.detail: narrow passage with red brick walls and green tile wainscoting
windows covered with wooden planks nailed across them
industrial metal stairs with railings leading upward
black metal safety railings along walkways

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the main warehouse hall into narrower brick corridors with boarded-up windows. The lighting becomes darker with only occasional candles. The character ascends a metal staircase to an upper level, passing industrial pipes and metal railings in the confined industrial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic Victorian alleyway that gradually opens into a muddy industrial clearing. It begins with the character walking past brick townhouses and wooden market stalls, where warm orange gas lamps contrast against a thick blue fog. As the path narrows into a tight brick passage, the visibility drops and the lighting grows darker, pressing the character toward a distant metal archway. The scene then shifts as the character passes through the gate onto an elevated wooden walkway flanked by construction scaffolding and a bright lamp post. Finally, the camera follows the character as they jump from the platform down to the muddy ground, transitioning from the enclosed corridors to a more open environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate outdoor encampment into the claustrophobic depths of an industrial warehouse. It begins by tracking the character through a muddy camp filled with canvas tents and wooden barrels, moving through a thick fog toward a looming brick building. As the character passes through the large open doors, the scene shifts from the gray outdoor mist to a dimly lit interior illuminated by burning barrels and scattered candles amidst heavy machinery. The camera then follows the character away from the main hall and into narrow brick corridors with boarded-up windows, where the light fades further. Finally, the movement ascends a metal staircase past industrial pipes and railings, transitioning from the open warehouse floor into a confined upper level.
